title: Simplified Crypto Trading App
author: Horror_Office_5737
selftext:
I’ve been working on a project focused on simplifying crypto market information because I genuinely think most platforms overwhelm people with too much noise, terminology, and chart overload.

The goal is to make market movement, momentum, and signals easier to actually understand without needing to stare at 15 graphs at once.

Finally put together a small landing page + waitlist and would genuinely appreciate feedback on the design, wording, or overall idea from people here.  
And if beta testing new software is something that interests you don’t be afraid to sign up. Cheers!

www.TheFlowPulseApp.com
